requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Timor-Leste ANE / EDTL Direction and IEC 63056 / NFPA 855
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——东帝汶ANE/EDTL方向与IEC 63056 / NFPA 855
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——東帝汶ANE/EDTL方向與IEC 63056 / NFPA 855

summary.en: Timor-Leste does not have a confirmed standalone public regulation that clearly maps BESS fire-safety installation to a single domestic code. Domestic projects are typically reviewed against ANE- and energy-sector-contracted technical routes, with EDTL and project owners driving grid-side review where installation is connected. IEC 63056 and NFPA 855 direction is still the most practical international reference in project documents for high-power battery installations. For EV and renewable interfaces, wind, heat, salt, and humidity exposure near coastal sites in Dili-based projects often force additional fire-safety evidence beyond minimum electrical test reports.
summary.zh: 东帝汶尚无公开确认的单一公开法规可将BESS消防安全安装映射为单一国内代码。国内项目通常按ANE与能源部门技术路径进行审查，由EDTL及项目业主推动并网侧审核。IEC 63056和NFPA 855方向仍是高功率储能项目文件中的国际主要参考。对于东帝汶充电与可再生接口，位于维里纽、马纳图克等海边或与Dili相关项目的风、热、盐雾和湿度暴露通常要求在项目文件中增加除最低电气试验报告之外的消防安全证据。
summary.zht: 東帝汶尚無公開確認的單一公開法規可將BESS消防安全安裝映射為單一國內代碼。國內項目通常按ANE與能源部門技術路徑進行審核，由EDTL及項目業主推動併網側審核。IEC 63056和NFPA 855方向仍為高功率儲能項目文件中的國際主要參考。對於東帝汶充電與可再生接口，位於維里努、馬納圖克等沿海或與Dili相關項目中的風、熱、鹽霧及潮濕暴露通常要求在項目文件中補充除最低電氣試驗報告之外的消防安全證據。

standards_or_laws: Timor-Leste ANE technical expectation for regulated high-energy electrical systems (confirmed as market-contacted institutional route, formal adoption details pending)
Electricidade de Timor-Leste (EDTL) project interface and site safety review requirements where grid-connected
NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code)
IEC 63056:2020 — Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation

summary.en: China uses GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36558, and GB/T 42288-2022 for battery and station-level fire-safety references. These can support baseline engineering review, but they are not substitute proof for Timor-Leste project-specific requirements where ANE/EDTL interconnection and local environmental assumptions apply.
summary.zh: 中国使用GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36558、GB/T 42288-2022作为电池与站级消防安全依据，可支持工程基础评估，但在需结合ANE/EDTL并网及本地环境假设的东帝汶项目中不能替代项目合规证明。
summary.zht: 中國使用GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36558、GB/T 42288-2022作為電池與站級消防安全依據，可支持工程基礎評估，但在需結合ANE/EDTL併網及本地環境假設的東帝汶項目中不能替代項目合規證明。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件
GB/T 42288-2022 — 电化学储能电站安全技术规程

gap.en: Gap: there is no clear public, unitary Timor-Leste domestic fire-standard for all BESS deployments. Project-level confirmation with ANE and EDTL or local project owner is required. Exporters should prepare IEC-aligned fire documentation, and also include humidity, salt-air, and thermal-protection assumptions for coastal Dili-linked projects. Type 2 interface decisions in EV-related BESS ecosystems and enclosure fire-control interfaces should be confirmed per project.
gap.zh: 差距：目前未见清晰公开的东帝汶统一BESS消防标准适用于所有项目。必须对ANE/EDTL或项目业主进行项目级确认。出口商应准备IEC对齐消防文件，并补充与Dili相关沿海项目的湿度、盐雾和热防护假设。对于相关EV生态中的Type 2接口或机柜消防控制接口，也需按项目确认。
gap.zht: 差距：目前未見清晰公開的東帝汶統一BESS消防標準適用於所有項目。必須對ANE/EDTL或項目業主進行項目級確認。出口商應準備IEC對齊消防文件，並補充與Dili相關沿海項目的濕度、鹽霧和熱防護假設。對於相關EV生態中的Type 2介面或機櫃消防控制介面，也需按項目確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — for project installations under ANE/EDTL interconnection and project-owner safety governance, fire-safety installation review is required; IEC 63056 and IEC 61851-related interfaces may be requested
mandatory_status.cn: Project and site documentation mandatory in China; Timor-Leste requires confirmation per ANE/EDTL project process

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Timor-Leste fire-safety installation clearance should be confirmed at the ANE/EDTL/project-owner level. IEC 63056 / NFPA 855 references are practical for project evidence, but local project acceptance in coastal, humid, and warm environments remains a key gap beyond core electrical type-test coverage.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 东帝汶的消防安全安装放行应在ANE、EDTL或项目业主层面确认。IEC 63056 / NFPA 855可作为项目证据方向，但沿海、潮湿、温热环境下的当地项目验收是超出核心电气型式试验覆盖的关键差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 東帝汶的消防安全安裝放行應在ANE、EDTL或項目業主層面確認。IEC 63056 / NFPA 855可作為項目證據方向，但沿海、潮濕、溫熱環境下的當地項目驗收是超出核心電氣型式試驗覆蓋的關鍵差距。
